negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for taylor_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,negated_conjecture,
    ~health_conscious_home(taylor)).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~disregards_wellbeing(taylor)).

    ~health_conscious_home(X0) | eats_salads_regularly(X0)).

    ~eats_salads_regularly(X0) | health_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~disregards_wellbeing(X0) | ~health_conscious(X0)).

% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.

    define fulfills_nutrition(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define visits_gym_daily(X0) := $false
